# NOMAD // CODELABS — Full site corpus

> Independent software house. We make software, beautifully. For a world without borders.

URL: https://nmdcd.com
Updated: 2026-06-06

---

## Home — https://nmdcd.com/

NOMAD // CODELABS is an independent software house. A worldwide team of makers building modern, meticulously crafted software — encrypted, fast, and unapologetically bold. New, independent, and entirely our own.

Tagline: We make software, beautifully. For a world without borders.

Studio approach:
- Borderless by design — no headquarters, no single timezone, no national bias.
- Made, not assembled — every product built with intent and obsessive detail.
- Loud, but calm — bold on the outside, quiet where it counts; keyboard-first, offline-aware.
- One connected world — distinct products that speak the same language.

The catalogue lists 13 products across encrypted media, health, invoicing, IPTV, the Minto productivity suite, publishing, film production, autonomous trading, writing, and infrastructure.

Beta signup is available on the home page and at https://nmdcd.com/beta.

---

## Beta program — https://nmdcd.com/beta

Join the Nomad Code Labs beta program for early access.

Products currently accepting beta users:
- Audiocrypt — encrypted audio DRM and licensing
- Fasting Cycle — intermittent fasting companion (iOS & Android)
- Feeper — invoicing for freelancers and nomads

---

## Audiocrypt — https://nmdcd.com/products/audiocrypt

Status: BETA OPEN
Category: Encrypted distribution
Tagline: Encrypt once. Sell everywhere. Steal nothing.

AudioCrypt is a secure digital rights and licensing management server with easy-to-use interfaces, built for healthcare audio files, digital creators, course creators, music composers, audio professionals, and independent studios. Files are encrypted once with military-grade AES-256-GCM and are never stored unencrypted — every asset carries a unique key.

License-gated offline playback: purchased files download to the customer's player and stay playable offline for as long as the license is valid.

Platforms: Web, API, macOS, Windows, iOS, Android

---

## Fasting Cycle — https://nmdcd.com/products/fasting-cycle

Status: BETA OPEN
Category: Health & rhythm
Tagline: One circle. Always on the phase you're in.

Fasting Cycle is a calm, precise fasting companion built around a single zooming circle that always focuses on the phase you're in — fasting, eating, or a full day's rhythm. Track weight, water, and steps with gentle reminders. Designed for people who live across timezones.

Platforms: iOS, Android

---

## Feeper — https://nmdcd.com/products/feeper

Status: BETA OPEN
Category: Invoicing
Tagline: Gorgeous invoices for freelancers and nomads.

Feeper is a multi-tenant invoicing SaaS for freelancers. Keyboard-first, with tax regimes from day one — EU VAT with reverse-charge, US sales tax, UAE VAT, Australian GST. Estimates convert to invoices in one click.

Platforms: Web, API

---

## Better TV — https://nmdcd.com/products/better-tv

Status: IN DEVELOPMENT
Category: Media client
Tagline: Every screen. One library. Perfectly in sync.

Better TV unifies Xtream Codes, M3U/M3U8, Jellyfin, and Emby behind one clean interface on iOS, tvOS, macOS, Android, Windows, and Linux. Cross-device sync for library, history, and recommendations.

Platforms: iOS, tvOS, macOS, Android, Windows, Linux

---

## Minto Contact — https://nmdcd.com/products/minto-contact

Status: IN DEVELOPMENT
Category: Minto suite
Tagline: The address book that actually remembers.

Modern contacts layer for the Minto suite — relationships, context, and history in one calm surface. Interoperates with Minto Task and Minto Form Creator.

Platforms: Web, iOS, Android

---

## Minto Task — https://nmdcd.com/products/minto-task

Status: IN DEVELOPMENT
Category: Minto suite
Tagline: Tasks that float to where the work actually is.

Task manager built on the Minto float model — work surfaces by relevance, not list order. Linked to Minto Contact and Form Creator.

Platforms: Web, iOS, Android, macOS

---

## Minto Form Creator — https://nmdcd.com/products/minto-form-creator

Status: IN DEVELOPMENT
Category: Minto suite
Tagline: Forms that compose themselves around the question.

Form builder for the Minto suite — structured intake that flows into Contact and Task automatically.

Platforms: Web

---

## Minto Mail — https://nmdcd.com/products/minto-mail

Status: IN DEVELOPMENT
Category: Minto suite
Tagline: A Mac mail client that finally feels like one app.

Keyboard-first Mac mail client with group-based inbox, messenger-style threads, and AI assist. Native Tauri 2 shell.

Platforms: macOS

---

## Rerista — https://nmdcd.com/products/rerista

Status: IN DEVELOPMENT
Category: Publishing
Tagline: The future of product journalism.

Magazine for the products that shape our world — in-depth reviews, expert insight, and stories that matter. Editorial-grade typography for long-form reading.

Platforms: Web

---

## Film Project Scheduler — https://nmdcd.com/products/film-scheduler

Status: IN DEVELOPMENT
Category: Production
Tagline: Breakdowns and schedules for film and TV, finally calm.

Production breakdown and scheduling — script to strip-board to shooting schedule. Built for ADs and producers.

Platforms: Web, iOS

---

## Joe the Trader — https://nmdcd.com/products/joe-the-trader

Status: INVITE ONLY
Category: Autonomous markets
Tagline: An autonomous AI trading desk that runs itself.

Full AI trading desk with specialist agents for research, risk, execution, and portfolio management. Disclosed-trade mirroring, strategy lanes, and hard risk gating. Offered by private invitation only.

Platforms: Web

---

## Writer's Room — https://nmdcd.com/products/writers-room

Status: RESEARCH
Category: Writing
Tagline: Where stories get built before they get written.

Collaborative writing room for screenwriters and authors — outlines, beats, and drafts in one place. In research.

Platforms: Web, macOS

---

## CloudCut SuperSonic — https://nmdcd.com/products/cloudcut-supersonic

Status: IN DEVELOPMENT
Category: Infrastructure
Tagline: Line-rate file transfer. Saturate the pipe.

Production-grade large-file transfer with parallel multipart uploads to Cloudflare R2, automatic resume, and per-part SHA-256 verification.

Platforms: macOS, Windows, API
